hero.subtitle: Advanced implantology, immediate-load options, and long-lasting restorations crafted in the heart of Istanbul.

form.title: Start your implant assessment
form.description: Tell us about your missing teeth or implant needs. Our coordinators will call you shortly.

fields.messagePlaceholder: Describe missing teeth, dentures, or implant goals.

paragraphs: At BM TÜRKIEY, we rebuild confident smiles with guided implant surgery, immediate loading when suitable, and precision prosthetics tailored to each jaw.
From single-tooth implants to All-on-4/All-on-6 rehabilitations, our surgeons and prosthodontists focus on long-term stability, chewing comfort, and natural aesthetics.

popularTreatments.title: Most Requested Restorations
popularTreatments.description: Guided implant treatments designed for stability, fast healing, and natural-looking prosthetics.

items.title: All-on-4 / All-on-6
items.description: Fixed full-arch solutions with guided surgery, titanium implants, and immediate provisional bridges when clinically suitable.

items.title: Single & Multiple Implants
items.description: Replace one or several missing teeth with precise implant placement and custom-milled crowns that blend seamlessly.

items.title: Implant-Supported Bridges
items.description: Stable, hygienic bridges anchored on implants to restore chewing power and natural tooth shape.

items.title: Bone Grafting & Sinus Lift
items.description: Vertical and lateral augmentation, sinus lift, and PRF-supported healing to create the ideal foundation for implants.

internationalPatients.description: We provide a seamless, safe and personalised implant treatment experience for international patients. With expert clinicians, modern technologies and dedicated coordinators, BM TÜRKIEY ensures a smooth and comfortable journey throughout your stay in Istanbul.

teamMembers.title: Meet the specialists behind every smile
teamMembers.description: A multidisciplinary team of dentists and coordinators dedicated to crafting confident, natural-looking smiles.

items.name: Dr. Selin A.
items.description: Over 12 years in cosmetic dentistry focusing on natural veneers, smile design, and minimally invasive treatments.

items.name: Dr. Emir K.
items.description: Full-mouth rehabilitations, advanced implant planning, and functional bite restoration with digital workflows.

items.name: Elif T.
items.description: Guides international patients, schedules appointments, and keeps every step transparent from first call to aftercare.

items.name: Mert C.
items.description: Supports chairside care, sterilization protocols, and ensures every visit runs smoothly and on time.

paragraphs: For years, our team has focused on designing natural, long-lasting smiles for patients from Türkiye, Europe, and around the world. Every treatment plan is prepared individually by combining minimally invasive techniques with advanced digital planning.
We take pride in a personalised approach, attention to detail, and results that feel natural, balanced, and confidence-boosting.

healthTourism.title: To Restore Your Bite
healthTourism.description: From first message to final check-up, our team guides you through a seamless implant journey at BM TÜRKIEY.

steps.label: STEP 1
steps.title: Tell us your implant case
steps.description: Share missing teeth, denture issues, photos, and X-rays (if available). Our coordinators review your needs carefully.

steps.label: STEP 2
steps.title: Plan & transparent quote
steps.description: Within 24 hours our doctors outline a tailored implant plan, healing timeline, and clear pricing.

steps.label: STEP 3
steps.title: Travel & implant surgery
steps.description: Once dates are set, we arrange airport pick-up, hotel options, and clinical appointments at BM TÜRKIEY.

steps.label: STEP 4
steps.title: Last check-up & maintenance
steps.description: Before you return home, we complete final checks, provide hygiene guidance, and plan remote follow-ups.

implantMatrix.title: Implant Options at a Glance
implantMatrix.description: Compare our most requested implant solutions, ideal indications, timelines in Türkiye, and expected results. Your final plan is confirmed after diagnostics.

rows.advantages: Fixed, stable, full set of teeth
values: Fixed, stable, full set of teeth

techniquesUsed.title: Advanced implant methods we use
techniquesUsed.description: From immediate implants to guided surgery, here are the core techniques our team applies to deliver stable, natural results.

slides.title: Immediate Implants
slides.body: For suitable cases, extraction and implant placement happen in the same visit, followed by a temporary crown. This reduces treatment time and avoids removable solutions during healing.

slides.title: All-on-4 / All-on-6
slides.body: Full-arch rehabilitation on 4–6 implants with guided planning and immediate provisional bridges when clinically appropriate, restoring confidence and function fast.

slides.title: Guided Surgery
slides.body: 3D imaging, surgical guides, and precise planning to optimise implant positioning, safety, and long-term stability for both single implants and full-arch cases.

googleReviews.title: Real Patient Stories, Real Reviews
googleReviews.description: A glimpse of what international patients say about their experience at BM TÜRKIEY.

items.name: Matthew
items.text: The entire implant process was seamless from the first WhatsApp message to the final check-up. The team explained every step clearly, helped with timing, and made me feel genuinely cared for. My new implant bridge looks incredibly natural — even months later, chewing feels stable and comfortable.

items.name: Sophie
items.text: Super professional team and a beautiful clinic. I felt safe, informed, and the results exceeded my expectations.

items.name: Helen
items.text: Loved the planning and communication. Everything ran on time, and the aftercare instructions were very clear.

items.name: Daniel
items.text: The process was very transparent. I knew exactly what would be done and how long it would take. The result looks natural and feels great.

items.name: Emily
items.text: Natural-looking teeth were my priority, and they nailed it. The shade and shape of my implant crowns fit my face perfectly.

items.name: Oliver
items.text: The clinic was spotless and the team was very attentive. Aftercare support was excellent and they replied quickly whenever I had a question.

faqs.title: Dental Implant FAQ
faqs.description: Quick answers for international implant patients.
faqs.footerNote: For medical accuracy, a final plan is confirmed after clinical assessment.

form.title: Schedule your implant consultation
form.description: Share a few details and our team will contact you shortly.

fields.messagePlaceholder: Tell us briefly about your smile goals.

items.title: How long should I plan to stay for implants?
items.subtitle: Full-arch cases typically need 5-7 days; staged healing is scheduled in advance.
items.body: For All-on-4/All-on-6, expect diagnostics, surgery, and provisional fitting within the week. If bone grafting is required, we plan staged visits with clear timelines.

items.title: Do dental implants hurt?
items.subtitle: Modern anesthesia and guided techniques minimise discomfort.
items.body: Most patients describe pressure rather than pain during placement. Mild post-op soreness is managed with medication and detailed aftercare instructions.

items.title: Is there a warranty / aftercare plan?
items.subtitle: Clear aftercare guidance and follow-up support after you return home.
items.body: You'll receive written aftercare instructions, remote follow-ups, and manufacturer warranty details for the implants used. Prosthetic warranty terms are explained during consultation.

items.title: Can I get a transparent quote before travelling?
items.subtitle: Yes — we provide a clear plan and cost estimate after your evaluation.
items.body: Share your details, photos, and any scans; our team prepares a preliminary plan and estimate. Final pricing depends on clinical examination and confirmed scope.
